final:
// // This module implements a 3-to-1 multiplexer to select the next program counter (nextPC) value based on the input selection signal (PC_sel). It takes three 32-bit inputs: ADD4, NPC, and jrPC. When PC_sel equals 3, it outputs ADD4; if PC_sel is 2 or if PC_sel is 1 and CMP_out is low, it outputs NPC; otherwise, it selects jrPC.
module top_module(
    input [31:0] ADD4,
    input [31:0] NPC,
    input [31:0] jrPC,
    input [2:0] PC_sel,
    input CMP_out,
    output [31:0] nextPC
    );assign nextPC = (PC_sel == 3)?jrPC:
						 ((PC_sel == 2)||((PC_sel == 1)&&(CMP_out == 1)))?NPC:ADD4;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 3-to-1 multiplexer to select the next program counter (nextPC) value based on the input selection signal (PC_sel). It takes three 32-bit inputs: ADD4, NPC, and jrPC. When PC_sel equals 3, it outputs ADD4; if PC_sel is 2 or if PC_sel is 1 and CMP_out is low, it outputs NPC; otherwise, it selects jrPC.
